arts.ttl: Alexander-Arnold injured: How does Bradley compare?
arts.sum: That’s going to be too early for him,” said head coach Arne Slot in his pre-match press conference when asked if Alexander-Arnold could be involved against Plymouth Argyle in Liverpool's FA Cup fourth-round tie on Sunday. If Alexander-Arnold misses the final Merseyside derby at Goodison Park (as Everton prepare to move to their new Bramley-Moore Dock Stadium at the start of next season) then Conor Bradley is likely to continue in his place.

arts.ttl: ‘Keep an eye’: Liverpool & Man United told they can sign Jamie Gittens if one thing happens
arts.sum: It’s difficult to imagine Liverpool looking to add yet another left winger to their ranks in the next transfer window.
